backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko backend actor with no methods or state defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the Hero component trust indicator was updated from '200 happy clients' to 'dozens of satisfied customers' with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and notable styling/content details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navbar, Hero, Services, About, Contact, and Footer components.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column About section featuring an owner portrait with a light-background name overlay, a floating experience badge, bio text, and a highlights grid with icons.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a light cream background, four contact info cards, and a free quote request form with fields for name, email, phone, service type, and message.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with a light cream background displaying brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, cream overlay, dark forest-colored headline and CTAs, and trust indicator stats showing 'Dozens of Satisfied Customers' instead of '200+ Happy Clients'.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive fixed navigation bar for a landscaping site with smooth-scroll links, scroll-based styling, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of eight landscaping services with icons, titles, and descriptions, plus a CTA banner at the bottom.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, defines earthy OKLCH CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds a subtle texture utility class.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Playfair Display/Inter fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (forest, soil, cream palettes), and typography/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state (version 17) for a static single-page landscaping company website, recording existing features, architectural notes, and known issues such as lingering 'greater metro area' text.
